---
title: "Secondary Tasks Analysis"
output: html_document
author:
  - "John Kafumbe"
  - "Jeffrey Olsen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(saccades)
library(lme4)
```

## `ST_*` alignment

```{r Read in DMS data}
# Function to clear environment
clear_env <- function() {
  rm(
    list = ls(envir = .GlobalEnv)[ls(envir = .GlobalEnv) != "non_aug_raw"],
    envir = .GlobalEnv
  )
  gc()
}

# Load in CSV
if (!exists("non_aug_raw")) {
  non_aug_raw <- read.csv("./data/non_aug_data.csv")
}

# Replace repeated button-press observations with zeros
non_aug <- non_aug_raw %>%
  mutate(Left_Button_Press = case_when(
    (Left_Button_Press == lag(Left_Button_Press)) &
      (Left_Button_Press == 1) |
      (Left_Button_Press == 2) ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ Left_Button_Press
  )) %>%
  mutate(Right_Button_Press = case_when(
    (Right_Button_Press == lag(Right_Button_Press)) &
      (Right_Button_Press == 1) |
      (Right_Button_Press == 2) ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ Right_Button_Press
  ))
# Replace coded 99 values from python script with NA values
non_aug[non_aug == 99] <- NA

# Use 1-base indexing for X (match row number)
non_aug$X <- 1:nrow(non_aug)
```

```{r Get ST columns}
output <- read_excel("./data/output_IIHS_withDMS.xls") %>%
  rename("ST_Right_N" = "ST_Rights_N") %>%
  select(matches("ST_(Right|Left).*"), DaqName, Subject, Drive) %>%
  relocate(DaqName, .after = Drive) %>%
  drop_na()

output$DaqName <- output$DaqName %>% str_sub(0, -5)

# Add counted hits from data set
output <- merge(output,
  rename(
    aggregate(Left_Button_Press ~ Subject + Drive,
      data = non_aug,
      FUN = sum,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    "Counted_Left_Button_Press" = "Left_Button_Press"
  ),
  by = c("Subject", "Drive"),
  all = TRUE
)
output <- merge(output,
  rename(
    aggregate(Right_Button_Press ~ Subject + Drive,
      data = non_aug,
      FUN = sum,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    "Counted_Right_Button_Press" = "Right_Button_Press"
  ),
  by = c("Subject", "Drive"),
  all = TRUE
)
```

```{r Locate button presses}
left_button_press_indices <- filter(non_aug, Left_Button_Press == 1)$X
right_button_press_indices <- filter(non_aug, Right_Button_Press == 1)$X
```

```{r Add and modify predictors}
non_aug$Blinking <- non_aug$LPupil_Diameter == 0 & non_aug$RPupil_Diameter == 0

# Get saccades, fixations, and blinks
saccade_sens <- 15 # Detection threshold parameter for `saccades` event detection
non_saccades <- detect.fixations(
  non_aug %>%
    select(
      DaqName,
      Gaze_Yaw,
      Gaze_Pitch,
      X
    ) %>%
    rename(
      trial = DaqName,
      x = Gaze_Yaw,
      y = Gaze_Pitch,
      time = X
    ),
  lambda = saccade_sens
)

# Add column to `non_aug` for eye event type
non_aug$Eye_Event <- "saccade"
indices <- mapply(seq, non_saccades$start, non_saccades$end)
flattened_indices <- unlist(indices)
non_aug$Eye_Event[flattened_indices] <- rep(as.character(non_saccades$event), times = lengths(indices))
non_aug[is.na(non_aug$Eye_Event), "Eye_Event"] <- "saccade"
```

```{r Plot high counts to debug, fig.show="hold", out.width = "50%"}
top_ten_left_press_runs <- head(arrange(output, desc(Counted_Left_Button_Press)), 10)$DaqName
for (run in top_ten_left_press_runs) {
  plot <- ggplot(
    data = filter(non_aug, DaqName == run),
    aes(
      x = seq(1, length(Left_Button_Press)),
      y = Left_Button_Press
    )
  ) +
    geom_point() +
    labs(
      title = run,
      x = "Frame",
      y = "Button press"
    )
  print(plot)
}
```

```{r Aggregate Matrix}
# Long-form wrt pre/post pairs

# 60 fps * 3 seconds =  180 Frames per window
time_frame <- 180

# Get first frame of each Daq
daq_first_frame <- non_aug %>%
  group_by(DaqName) %>%
  summarize(first_x = min(X), .groups = "drop")

# Cleaned button press frames
press_events <- non_aug %>%
  filter(Left_Button_Press == 1 | Right_Button_Press == 1) %>%
  select(DaqName, Subject, Drive, X, Left_Button_Press, Right_Button_Press)

# Window of frames around each press
task_windows <- press_events %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  reframe(
    DaqName = DaqName,
    Subject = Subject,
    Drive = Drive,
    # Want the frame number within the run of the simulator
    Press_Frame = X + 1 - daq_first_frame$first_x[match(DaqName, daq_first_frame$DaqName)],
    Button = ifelse(Left_Button_Press == 1, "Left", "Right"),
    Frame = c(
      (X - time_frame):(X - 1),
      X:(X + time_frame - 1)
    ), # Include frame of press since press occurred before recording
    Phase = c(
      rep("Pre_Press", time_frame),
      rep("Post_Press", time_frame)
    )
  )

# Find the boundaries of every task block per Daq run
task_boundaries <- task_windows %>%
  group_by(DaqName, Subject, Drive, Press_Frame) %>%
  summarise(
    Task_Start_X = min(Frame),
    Task_End_X = max(Frame),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(DaqName, Task_Start_X) %>%
  group_by(DaqName) %>%
  mutate(
    Control_Start = lag(Task_End_X) + 1,
    Control_End = Task_Start_X - 1
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(Control_Start) & Control_End >= Control_Start)

# Expand these boundaries into actual individual frame rows
control_windows <- task_boundaries %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  reframe(
    DaqName = DaqName,
    Subject = Subject,
    Drive = Drive,
    Press_Frame = Press_Frame, # Linking it to the upcoming press
    Button = "None", # Baseline driving, no button active
    Frame = Control_Start:Control_End,
    Phase = "Control"
  )

# Combine with original Pre/Post task windows with the new control windows
all_windows <- bind_rows(task_windows, control_windows) %>%
  arrange(DaqName, Frame)

# Pull in raw eye data for ALL windows (Tasks and Controls)
task_windows_with_control <- all_windows %>%
  inner_join(select(non_aug, -DaqName), by = c("Subject", "Drive", "Frame" = "X"))


# Aggregate into one row per window with the control phases
task_matrix <- task_windows_with_control %>%
  group_by(DaqName, Subject, Drive, Press_Frame, Button, Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    LPupil_Diameter_mean = mean(LPupil_Diameter, na.rm = TRUE),
    RPupil_Diameter_mean = mean(RPupil_Diameter, na.rm = TRUE),
    Gaze_Pitch_mean = mean(Gaze_Pitch, na.rm = TRUE),
    Gaze_Yaw_mean = mean(Gaze_Yaw, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(task_matrix, "./data/task_matrix.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Get control frames (not near tasks)
control_frames <- setdiff(non_aug$X, task_windows$Frame)

# Make wide-form version for paired differences
wideform_task_matrix <- task_matrix %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Phase,
    values_from = tail(colnames(task_matrix), -5)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    RPupil_Diameter_mean_diff = RPupil_Diameter_mean_Post_Press - RPupil_Diameter_mean_Pre_Press,
    LPupil_Diameter_mean_diff = LPupil_Diameter_mean_Post_Press - LPupil_Diameter_mean_Pre_Press,
    Gaze_Yaw_mean_diff = Gaze_Yaw_mean_Post_Press - Gaze_Yaw_mean_Pre_Press,
    Gaze_Pitch_mean_diff = Gaze_Pitch_mean_Post_Press - Gaze_Pitch_mean_Pre_Press,
    Pupil_Diff_Avg = (RPupil_Diameter_mean_diff + LPupil_Diameter_mean_diff) / 2
  )

# Fixed Effect = Button (Left vs Right)
# Random effect

model_combined <- lmer(Pupil_Diff_Avg ~ factor(Drive) + (1 | Subject), data = wideform_task_matrix)
summary(model_combined)
```
